title: ContentItem
description: A single planned content unit from content-plan; carried through research → studio → review (spec §7.2-§7.4, §12).

locale.description: BCP-47-ish locale tag; primary if omitted.

brief.description: Pre-generation steering written at Gate 1. Consumed by content-studio.

angle.description: The specific take or argument for this piece.

hook_direction.description: How to open (stat-first, failure-story, question, etc.).

tone.description: Voice/style note, e.g. 'strategic informality, peer not vendor'.

avoid.description: Phrases, claims, or framings to exclude.

audience.description: Who this piece is for — a segment name from icp-personas.md or a short free-form description. Optional; operator-steerable at Gate 1.
